question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the main sections of the thesis. It only mentions that there are three chapters (nodaļas) but does not provide a detailed description or outline of each chapter.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section, but it lacks detail and specificity. For example, what specific problems will be analyzed in the second chapter? What kind of comparative analysis will be performed in the third chapter?

question: Structure
feedback: The text provides a general idea of the structure of the thesis, but it lacks clarity and specificity. It is not clear how the three chapters will be organized or what specific topics will be covered in each chapter. A more detailed outline would help to clarify the structure of the thesis.
